heading: Interstate agreements for airport facilities
label: 40124 Interstate agreements for airport facilities
text: Congress consents to a State making an agreement, not in conflict with a law of the United States, with another State to develop or operate an airport facility.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesThis restates 49:44502(e) as 49:40121 [now 40124] to provide a more appropriate place in title 49.
